posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Creativity as a team sport with NIKE’s Former CMO

In this exclusive virtual event hosted by monday.com, Greg Hoffman, NIKE’s former CMO and 28 year company veteran, draws insights from the best teams in the world of sport — and how their playing style mirrors that of high-performing, innovative organizations.

In this webinar you will learn how to…

  • Fuel creativity into your campaign creation from Greg’s real-life learnings while at NIKE
  • Foster a culture of operational excellence through teamwork in your own organization
  • Strategize, execute, and iterate on product launches and marketing campaigns with Greg’s turnkey approach

BONUS! Registrants will receive access to Greg’s exclusive, custom workspace built with monday.com — where you’ll learn his tips and tricks for building a retail or marketing strategy that turns ideas into dollars.
